Hi Emily, Rachel, Sarah,

Quick recap from our Bridge Integration kickoff on March 28 and where we go from here.

**Decisions locked:**
- Three-phase scope adopted. Phase 1 = auth, phase 2 = payouts, phase 3 = settlement reporting.
- Rachel is tech lead for phase 1 from the Platform side.
- Phase 1 Bridge work depends on Atlas Migration wave 1 completion.

**Action items:**
- Rachel to implement the phase 1 state machine (target April 30)
- Sarah to coordinate the Atlas wave 1 handoff once ready (target April 22)
- Emily to confirm Payments test environment access (target April 14)
- Sam to confirm phase 1 timeline back to Emily (target April 14)

**Open question:**
Emily — your April 7 note asked for timeline confirmation pinned to Q2 planning. Rachel and I will align on this by Monday and send an update.

Let's plan to meet again April 11 to check phase 1 progress and finalize the Atlas handoff plan.

Thanks,
Sam
